fetch_tools: fetch tools from a running Playwright MCP HTTP server and return the raw tool list
tools_to_openapi: convert a list of MCP tool definitions into an OpenAPI 3.0 JSON specification
main: run the CLI to fetch MCP tools from a server URL and emit an OpenAPI JSON spec
parse_sse_body: parse an SSE-formatted response body and extract the first JSON payload from data lines
decode_response: decode an MCP HTTP response handling both JSON and SSE content types
